phase_label: per-screen sweep — Login + Dashboard + Inventory 4-gate closed, 17 screens remain
reason: Phase 5 per-screen sweep is multi-session by design. This session closed Dashboard's outstanding logs+screenshot gates (previous PAUSED.json) and added Inventory as a fully gated screen. 17 remaining screens each need the same depth of work (~30-90 min of agent time per screen for endpoint pre-flight, models, repo, providers, screen, registry update, build, install, log validation, and screenshot diff). Halting per orchestrator protocol so resume path can be picked deliberately rather than burning session budget on a partial 4th screen.
completed_this_session: Dashboard logs gate: drove login via adb input + .env.test, verified 'loaded 8 dashboard cards' log line, zero failure patterns in logcat.

Dashboard RULE 14 root-cause fixes: (a) leaderboard data source was /contributions/summary but real source is /auth/me data.leaderboard.rankings (web reads at index.html:14664) — previous 'RULE 1 catch' had mis-corrected from /contributions/leaderboard → /contributions/summary; (b) InventoryStats wrapper key was 'items' but real key is 'inventory' — silently zeroed lowCount even when prod had 2 low items; (c) new AttributionStats DTO + /receipts/attribution-stats endpoint wired into the dashboard fan-out so the nudge shows the actual count ('292 receipts untagged') matching web copy. Committed as df5c029.
Inventory pre-flight: caught 3 fabricated endpoints in registry (F-312, F-342, F-353) and corrected them inline with line refs to the real backend routes.

Inventory code: 4 new files (~960 LOC) — inventory_models.dart, inventory_repository.dart, inventory_providers.dart, inventory_screen.dart + router wire. 28 ✅ rows implemented (add-card + form, search, all three filter dropdowns, show-empty toggle, category chips, low badge, group headers w/ expiring-soon subcount, tile w/ name+location+expiry+bought+qty, swipe gestures both directions, tap-expand action row w/ +3d/cart/-1/used-up). 46 🔄 rows have detailed deferral notes pointing to their sub-trees so a follow-up agent can pick them up without re-reading the source.
Inventory 4-gate: preflight ✅ registry ✅ build ✅ (BUILD SUCCESSFUL 7.6s) logs ✅ ('loaded 86 inventory items (low=2)' fired in <2s, zero failure patterns).

remaining_screens.depends_on: shared photo subsystem (also unlocks F-333/F-355/F-363..F-365/F-374 on Inventory and F-411/F-419/F-429/F-430 here); edit-product sheet (also unlocks F-362..F-368 on Inventory); merge-duplicates (F-320 on Inventory)
remaining_screens.estimated_endpoints: GET /products, GET /products/search, POST /products/create, PUT /products/<id>/update, DELETE /products/<id>, POST /products/merge-duplicates, PATCH /products/<id>/low-status, PATCH /products/<id>/unit-defaults, PUT /products/<id>/category, POST /product-snapshots/upload, DELETE /product-snapshots/<id>, POST /product-snapshots/<id>/promote, POST /product-snapshots/generate

remaining_screens.depends_on: /api/stores integration (F-1014/F-1021 + F-310 on Inventory); identify-photo OCR; session banner card
remaining_screens.estimated_endpoints: GET /shopping-list, POST /shopping-list/items, PATCH /shopping-list/items/<id>, POST /shopping-list/identify-photo, GET /shopping-list/sessions/current, GET /recommendations, POST /recommendations/<id>/dismiss, GET /api/stores

remaining_screens.depends_on: shared receipt detail viewer; attribution flow
remaining_screens.estimated_endpoints: GET /receipts, GET /receipts/<id>, POST /receipts/upload, POST /receipts/manual, POST /receipts/<id>/approve, /receipts/<id>/update, /receipts/<id>/reprocess, /receipts/<id>/rotate, POST /receipts/<id>/attribution, /receipts/bulk-attribution, /receipts/bulk-update, GET /receipts/attribution-stats (already wired for Dashboard)

remaining_screens.depends_on: feature-flag gating (already in router via restaurant_enabled check)
Plaid (out of scope per VETO_RESOLUTION_PATCH — link flow uses webview)

remaining_screens.estimated_endpoints: GET /contributions/summary (now the screen's primary source — full payload includes notes/opportunities/recent_events/rules/summary subtree)

remaining_screens.depends_on: barcode scanner (mobile_scanner pkg already in pubspec)
remaining_screens.estimated_endpoints: GET /medications, POST /medications, PUT /medications/<id>, DELETE /medications/<id>, POST /medications/barcode-lookup, GET /medications/<id>/photo, GET /household-members, POST /household-members, DELETE /household-members/<id>

remaining_screens.depends_on: chat panel (F-032..F-038), confirm dialog, toast/undo, manual-entry overlay; theme toggle (F-021) already partially wired

operational_constraints: Disk /System/Volumes/Data was 1.2 Gi free at session close. Each `flutter build apk --debug` writes ~150-300 MB to .gradle + build/. Next session should `flutter clean` between major rebuilds or free more disk before continuing.

Build APK installed on emulator-5554 is dev-flavor (package com.localocr.extended.localocr.extended.dev). PersistCookieJar persists session across cold launches — subsequent sessions can skip the adb-input login dance unless cookie expires (Flask default ~7d).

.env.test stays gitignored. TEST_PASSWORD must not appear in logs/commits/stdout. To read it in bash use `PW=$(grep '^TEST_PASSWORD=' .env.test | cut -d= -f2-)` and pass via `printf '%s'` to adb input.
resume_paths: A: continue per-screen sweep in registry order (Products → Shopping → Receipts → ...). Each screen follows the Inventory template: pre-flight grep blueprint + jsonify, write models/repo/providers/screen, wire router, build, install, drawer-nav to screen, verify loaded N line, RULE 14 screenshot if web parity is meaningful for that screen.

B: batch related screens into shared subsystems first (photo subsystem → unlocks Products + Inventory deferrals; receipt detail viewer → unlocks Receipts + Expenses + Bills; shared-dining client → unlocks Balances + Contacts). Probably faster overall but each commit is larger.
C: scope reduction — ship Login + Dashboard + Inventory as v1 (already a usable household-tracking app), defer the other 17 screens to v1.1+. Update ROADMAP/PROJECT to reflect.
D: parallelize via subagent dispatch — one agent per screen, each reading the same prompt + working in a worktree. Requires coordinator to merge.
next_concrete_action: Pick resume path. If A: orchestrator can simply re-invoke build stage; the next session will see Inventory in screens_done and pick up Products. If B/C/D: human picks before invoking.
